title: Campaigns - Munira.org.uk
headings: h3: Fighting Heathrow noise and pollution
h3: Demanding better SWR rail services
text_excerpt: Campaigns - Munira.org.uk --> --> Home Help & Advice News Media Campaigns Get in touch Campaigns Munira is the Liberal Democrat Spokesperson for Education. However, her work is not confined to this area alone. Whilst she was the Health Spokesperson, she coordinated the Liberal Democrat response to the coronavirus, while continuing to fight on issues such as Heathrow expansion, local transport links and children and young people’s mental health. You can read about Munira’s work, past and present in this campaigns section. If you have a question about anything or would like to get involved, please contact Munira . Campaigns Protecting our precious river Munira continues to fight for Thames Water’s sewage recycling proposals at Teddington (the TDRA) to be scrapped. Read more Fighting Heathrow noise and pollution Munira is holding Heathrow and the Government to account on aircraft noise and pollution. Read more Demanding better SWR rail services Munira has consistently challenged SWR and the Government on the endless delays, cancellations and poor service that have left residents stranded. Read more Kinship carers Munira has introduced the Kinship Care Bill in Parliament to step up for those who step up for a child in crisis Read more Children’s mental health Munira is demanding urgent action to tackle the crisis in children’s mental health Read more Teddington Police Station The building should be retained for community use, not sold to the highest bidder Read more Join 100s of local residents Subscribe now to join Munira’s mailing list. You can choose to receive info about events, campaigns, or news, and you can unsubscribe at any time. Sign up Privacy Munira Wilson MP is the Member of Parliament for Twickenham. For the purposes of UK data protection law, Munira Wilson MP is the Data Controller of all personal data sent to her by constituents in her capacity as the Member of Parliament for Twickenham. --> Follow Munira on Facebook and Twitter © 2020 - 2026 Munira Wilson MP Website designed and created by The Sustainable Printworks Useful links Resources About Munira Report Back archive National Liberal Democrat Party Twickenham and Richmond Liberal Democrats Data Protection and Privacy Policy Just to let you know... This website uses cookies to improve your experience. We'll assume you're ok with this, but you can opt-out if you wish. Cookie settings Accept Privacy & Cookies Policy Close Privacy Overview This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may have an effect on your browsing experience. Necessary Necessary Always Enabled Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information. Non-necessary Non-necessary Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website. SAVE & ACCEPT
